holdings.infoBox: AVIV is an equity ETF with a total of 658 individual holdings. The top holdings are Banco Bilbao Vizcaya Argentaria stock at 2.10%, Shell at 1.96%, Roche Holding AG at 1.90%, BHP Group at 1.51%, and BP p.l.c. at 1.37%.

overview.description: The Avantis International Large Cap Value ETF (AVIV) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund is an actively managed fund primarily investing in non-US developed market equities with lower prices relative to their book values. AVIV was launched on Sep 28, 2021 and is issued by American Century Investments.
